commands.name: setup
commands.description: Initialize RGB LED PWM pins and common-anode/cathode behavior.

commands.name: set_rgb
commands.description: Set red, green, and blue brightness values.

commands.name: set_color
commands.description: Set the LED using a known color name.

commands.name: blink
commands.description: Blink the LED with the given RGB color.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Cycle red, green, and blue to verify wiring.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Return driver metadata and current configuration.
